originalCode:
# Changelog

All notable changes to the Augment Agent extended configuration.

---

## 2026-06-04 — Karpathy Guidelines

### Added
- **Karpathy Guidelines** skill (`skills/karpathy-guidelines/`) — behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes
  - Based on [Andrej Karpathy's observations](https://x.com/karpathy/status/2015883857489522876) on LLM coding pitfalls
  - 4 core principles: Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution
  - Source: [multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills](https://github.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills)
- Updated `README.md` to include karpathy-guidelines in skills table
- Updated `SKILLS-AND-AGENTS.md` with detailed karpathy-guidelines section

### Impact
- Reduces overcomplication, bloated abstractions, and unnecessary code changes
- Forces explicit assumptions and clarifying questions before implementation
- Promotes test-driven, verifiable success criteria
- Encourages surgical, minimal changes that trace directly to user requests

---

## 2026-04-03 — Initial Setup

### Added
- **3 marketplace plugins adapted** from Claude Code to Augment Agent:
  - **Superpowers** (14 skills, 1 agent) — primary workflow framework
  - **Everything Claude Code** (~130 skills, 37 agents) — supplementary
  - **UI/UX Pro Max** — searchable design database (67 styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings)
- **Path remapping**: all `~/.claude/` paths converted to `~/.augment/`
- **Session lifecycle rules** (`rules/session-lifecycle.md`):
  - Rule 0: Transparency banners ([●] rules, [◆] skills, [▲] agents, [!] safety)
  - Rule 1: Auto-resume context on session start, auto-offer `/ck:init` for new projects
  - Rule 2: Auto-save on session end, git commit/merge/push, or milestone completion
  - Rule 3: Continuous-learning evaluation (inline — no transcript file dependency)
  - Rule 4: ck command reminders
- **Priority rules** (`rules/superpowers-priority.md`): Superpowers always over ECC
- **Continuous-learning fix**: runs inline (agent reviews conversation directly) since Augment doesn't provide `$CLAUDE_TRANSCRIPT_PATH`
- **Context Keeper (ck)**: centralized at `~/.augment/ck/` — no repo pollution
- **Documentation**:
  - `INSTALL.md` — full installation and adaptation guide (Tasks 1-9)
  - `SKILLS-AND-AGENTS.md` — complete walkthrough of all ~190 skills and 38 agents
  - `README.md` — repo overview and restore instructions

---

## 2026-04-04 — MCP Servers

### Added
- **4 free MCP servers** configured via `auggie mcp add`:
  - **Context7** — live library/framework documentation lookup
  - **iterm-mcp** — iTerm2 terminal read/write integration
  - **playwright** — browser automation and E2E testing
  - **sequential-thinking** — structured multi-step reasoning
- Updated `README.md` with MCP server table
- Updated `CHANGELOG.md` with MCP entry

### Notes
- Paid MCP servers (Exa, Firecrawl, fal.ai, Jira, Nutrient, LaraPlugins) deferred until API keys available
- Node.js v22 required for `auggie` CLI (v16 in default PATH needs fixing)

---

## 2026-04-03 — Initial Setup

### Security
- `session.json` excluded (contains auth token)
- Local data gitignored: sessions, checkpoints, task storage, ck contexts, prompt history
- `.gitkeep` files preserve directory structure in repo
